The '''Katarn estate''' was the farmland on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] owned by the [[Katarn family]].

==Geography==
It lay about fourty [[kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] to the west of [[Barons Hed|Baron's Hed]].<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref> It was bordering the [[Danga estate]]. To the east was the meeting place of the local [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]<ref name="SftE" /> and twenty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] to the north was a stone quarry from which Morgan made parts for his homestead. Nearby was an once-prosperous [[factory/Legends|factory]].<ref name="RA" /> To the north west was a vehicle park.<ref name="RAAD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>

Around the estate were various bushes, plants and animals, such as [[Poro poppy|poro poppies]] and [[nantha]]s; [[eye-eye snake]]s and [[hole ball]]s nested and wandered around the undergrowth.<ref name="RA" />

It contained the [[Katarn family compound]], a [[Solar collector/Legends|solar panel]], at least four pump stations, a large irrigation system, a [[tap tree]], and [[variform bean]] crops.<ref name="SftE">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref> Like his neighbors, [[Morgan Katarn]] made an underground irrigation network under his farm, comprising of droid-dug tunnels and pipes and tubes that distributed moisture from the tap trees wherever it was needed. Droids dug and maintained them as some of them were too small for an adult [[human/Legends|human]]; access hatches led into the tunnels at several points, such as near the kitchen backdoor, or the vehicle park. One of the shafts was labeled "main central".<ref name="RA" />

==History==
Young [[Kyle Katarn]] used to explore and play in the little-known trails around the estate. Since he grew up, the undergrowth had grew into itself and the old routes had become a little more than game trails.<ref name="RA" /> Like other farmers, Morgan made use of [[Droid/Legends|droids]] around his farm. A [[BT-16 perimeter droid|BT-16]] perimeter security droid however caused the deathof [[Patricia Katarn|his wife]].<ref name="DFS">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050407a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 1}}</ref>

It was burned to the ground by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commandos under [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in a raid for the [[subjugation of Sulon]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="SftE" /> [[Agrirobot/Legends|Agro droids]] that labored around the farm were shot.<ref name="RA" />

In [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]] Jerec returned to Sulon in his search for the [[Valley of the Jedi]], knowing that [[Morgan Katarn]] made [[Map to the Valley of the Jedi|map to it]]. Jerec moved his entire force over Sulon, and his forces ransacked the homestead. Three of his [[seven Dark Jedi]] - Sariss, her [[Epicanthix]] apprentice [[Yun]], and the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Boc Aseca]] discovered the map. With them was a vehicle containing a half-dozen [[Transport/Legends|transports]], [[Hoversled/Legends|gravsleds]] and a mobile [[command post]]. After they removed and took the map to [[Barons Hed|Baron's Hed]], the farm was left under the heavy guard of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] and [[Grave Tuskens]], mercenary [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] from the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that acted as the personal soldiers of the Dark Jedi [[Maw (Dark Jedi)|Maw]]. Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[Imperial_commando/Legends|Commandos]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] also patrolled the farm grounds. [[Sentry droid/Legends|Sentries]] were placed around the structure to inhibit any intruders, and alert a response force to arrive.<ref name="RA" />

Kyle Katarn sneaked into the farm and the homestead, and reactivated the family droid [[WeeGee]] from whom he learned about the Map and its significance, and decided to reach Baron's Hed to retrieve the map pieces. They exited from the kitchen backdoor, and after killing [[Brollo]] and a Stormtrooper, they opened a nearby hatch leading to the tunnels. Past the main central shaft, and on their way to the the north-west, they were attacked by [[Battle droid/Legends|war droid]] [[8-13]], which WeeGee wrestled and decapitated with his heavy duty arm. A while later, they reached a hatch right at the nearby vehicle park. Apparently it was the discovery of the dead guards that made the troopers, commandos and mercenaries stationed in the park to run towards the homestead, allowing Katarn and WeeGee to exit and steal a [[T-4 (vehicle)|T-4]].<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD" /> 

Havoc followed in [[Barons Hed]] and the nearby [[Fuel City]], calling almost all of the forces to leave the farm and muster to other places. After some pursuit in the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'', Kyle correctly guessed that the farm would now be empty, as the place they expected him less likely to return. The ''Crow'' landed inside the factory ruins where the pair rested before resuming their quest for the Valley of the Jedi.<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD" />
